# services.tabbyapi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tabbyapi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tabbyapi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable tabbyapi. |
| `services.tabbyapi.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for the TabbyAPI port. |
| `services.tabbyapi.package` | `package` | The tabbyapi package to use. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration for TabbyAPI. https://github.com/theroyallab/tabbyAPI/wiki/02.-Server-options |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.logging.log_prompt` | `boolean` | Enable prompt logging. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.logging.log_requests` | `boolean` | Enable request logging. Only use for debug. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.model.cache_mode` | `string` | Cache mode for VRAM savings. ExLlamaV2: FP16, Q8, Q6, Q4. ExLlamaV3: specific pair string (e.g., '8,8'). |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.model.dummy_model_names` | `list of string` | List of fake model names sent via the /v1/models endpoint. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.model.gpu_split_auto` | `boolean` | Automatically allocate resources to GPUs. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.model.max_seq_len` | `null or signed integer` | Max sequence length. Set null to use model defaults. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.model.model_dir` | `string` | Directory to look for models. Relative to the state directory. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.model.model_name` | `null or string` | The initial model to load on startup. Must exist in model_dir. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.network.api_servers` | `list of string` | Select API servers to enable. Options: OAI, Kobold. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.network.disable_auth` | `boolean` | Disable HTTP token authentication. WARNING: Vulnerable if exposed. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.network.host` | `string` | The IP to host on. Use 0.0.0.0 to expose on all adapters. |
| `services.tabbyapi.settings.network.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to host on. |
